{{Infobox concept
| name = Astral Tide
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Astral Tide]] is a unique element that occurs in the [[Farwing Nebula]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Astral Tide]] carries many times more weight than natural water.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Astral Tide]] cannot be found naturally and can only be conjured.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
